allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('visuals_dataset.ipynb'\)\); [print\(i, c.get\('id','?'\), c['cell_type'], repr\(c['source'][:60]\) if c['source'] else ''\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells'][-6:]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('visuals_dataset.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(i, c.get\('id','?'\), c['cell_type'], repr\(''.join\(c['source']\)[:80]\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells'][-6:]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('visuals_dataset.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Total cells:', len\(nb['cells']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('visuals_dataset.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Total cells:', len\(nb['cells']\)\); [print\(i, c.get\('id','noID'\), c['cell_type'], repr\(''.join\(c['source']\)[:70]\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells'][46:]\)]")
